1.  Example Domain & More
    This domain is for use in illustrative examples in documents. You may use this domain …
2.  Example - Wikipedia
    An example is something selected to represent a group or set, often a typical case.
3.  IANA Example Domains
    As described in RFC 2606 and RFC 6761, a number of domains such as example.com are reserved.
Settings
4.  Example Domain (dup)
